name: query-remote-execution
bodyMarkdown:
# Remote Execution (HackTools) Detection Query

**Category:** Detection Chokepoints | **Maturity:** Hunt | **FP Rate:** Medium
**Techniques:** T1021.002, T1569.002 | **Log Sources:** WEL 7045, WEL 4624

```kql
DeviceEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| where ActionType == "ServiceInstalled"
| extend ServiceName = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).ServiceName)
| extend ServiceFileName = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).FileName)
| where ServiceFileName has "\\Temp\\" or ServiceFileName has "\\tmp\\" or ServiceFileName has "\\Downloads\\"
| where strlen(ServiceName) <= 10
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, ServiceName, ServiceFileName
| sort by Timestamp desc
```
